title: Centre urges Supreme Court to do away with PIL jurisdiction; CJI responds
description: The Central government on Wednesday urged the Supreme Court to review the framework of Public Interest Litigation (PILs), a type of court jurisdiction invoked by citizens to address issues affecting larger public interest.Solicitor General Tushar Mehta made submissions for removal of PIL jurisdiction on Wednesday before a nine-judge Constitution Bench which is currently hearing a reference arising out of the Sabarimala review.
